Background

My History

I am Anotida Manguwe — a passionate ICT student and self-driven technologist based in Zambia. From an early curiosity about how computers work, I have evolved into a multi-disciplinary developer with a love for problem-solving, creative design, and teaching others. The TIMTIML brand is my digital identity — a space where technology meets creativity.
The Beginning

🌱 First Steps into Tech

My journey started with a deep fascination for computers and how digital systems function. I began exploring programming fundamentals and hardware concepts, quickly realising that technology was my calling.

Education

🎓 ICT Studies

Currently pursuing a formal education in Information & Communication Technology, diving deep into computer science principles, networking, hardware architecture, and software engineering.

Development

💻 Programming Journey

Over time I mastered multiple languages — C, C++, Java, Python, C#, JavaScript, HTML & CSS — building a broad technical toolkit that spans low-level systems to interactive web applications.

Networking

🔌 Cisco & Networking

Earned Cisco certifications and developed strong skills in network configuration, computer organisation, and IT infrastructure — bridging the gap between software and hardware worlds.

Creativity

🎨 Graphic Design

Extended my skills beyond code into visual communication — creating professional posters, banners, and digital artwork that combine aesthetics with purpose for clients across Zambia and beyond.

Brand

🚀 TIMTIML Is Born

TIMTIML emerged as my personal brand — a platform to showcase work, share knowledge, offer services, and connect with a global community of tech enthusiasts and learners.

Cambridge / ZIMSEC

O Level Computer Science

O Level Computer Science introduces you to the fundamentals of how computers work — from binary logic to writing your first programs. Whether you're studying Cambridge IGCSE or the Zambian/Zimbabwean curriculum, this course builds a rock-solid foundation for further studies and a career in tech.

  • Data representation — binary, hex, and character encoding
  • Computer hardware — CPU, memory, storage, I/O devices
  • Networking basics — LANs, WANs, the internet
  • Programming fundamentals — pseudocode and flowcharts
  • Algorithms — sorting, searching, and problem-solving
  • Cybersecurity — threats, malware, and safe practices
  • Database concepts — tables, queries, and SQL basics
  • Software development lifecycle
💬 Get Help with O Level CS
Advanced Level

A Level Computer Science

A Level Computer Science takes you deep into the theory and practice of computing. You'll explore complex algorithms, data structures, object-oriented programming, and computational thinking at a level that prepares you for university-level computer science and professional software development.

  • Advanced algorithms — complexity, Big O notation
  • Data structures — stacks, queues, trees, graphs, hash tables
  • Object-oriented programming — classes, inheritance, polymorphism
  • Functional programming concepts
  • Computer architecture — Von Neumann model, fetch-execute cycle
  • Operating systems — scheduling, memory management
  • Databases — relational theory, normalisation, SQL
  • Boolean algebra and logic circuits
  • Artificial intelligence introduction
💬 Get Help with A Level CS
Eden University · BSc Information Technology · Year 1

👋 Hey Varsity Mate!

Struggling with your degree modules? Anotida is a fellow BSc IT student at Eden University — he gets it. From programming assignments to networking labs and ethical hacking concepts, get real peer-level help here.

BSc IT · Core Module

💻 Programming & OOP

From writing your first functions to mastering object-oriented design — help with assignments, projects, and exam prep.

  • C, C++, Java, Python fundamentals
  • Object-oriented programming — classes, inheritance, polymorphism
  • Data structures — arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues
  • Algorithm design and complexity (Big O)
  • Debugging and code review
  • Assignment and project help
💬 Get Programming Help
BSc IT · Networking

🌐 Networking & Cisco

Cisco-certified help for networking modules. From subnetting headaches to router configs — peer-level explanations that actually make sense.

  • OSI & TCP/IP models
  • IP addressing and subnetting
  • Routing protocols — RIP, OSPF, EIGRP
  • VLANs, switches and trunking
  • Wireless networking concepts
  • Cisco Packet Tracer labs
💬 Get Networking Help
BSc IT · Cybersecurity

🔐 Ethical Hacking & Cybersecurity

Currently studying ethical hacking — Anotida can help fellow students understand the concepts, tools, and techniques covered in cybersecurity modules.

  • Phases of ethical hacking — Recon, Scanning, Exploitation
  • Footprinting & information gathering
  • Network scanning — Nmap, Wireshark
  • Vulnerability assessment concepts
  • Social engineering & phishing awareness
  • Password attacks & countermeasures
  • Firewalls, IDS/IPS and security policies
  • CEH concepts and exam topics
⚠️ For educational purposes only — ethical, legal use
💬 Get Cybersecurity Help
BSc IT · Data

🗄️ Databases & SQL

From ER diagrams to complex SQL queries — help with database design, normalisation, and practical assignments.

  • Entity-Relationship (ER) modelling
  • Relational database design
  • Normalisation — 1NF, 2NF, 3NF, BCNF
  • SQL — SELECT, JOIN, GROUP BY, subqueries
  • Transactions and concurrency
  • MySQL / SQLite practical work
💬 Get Database Help
BSc IT · Web

🌍 Web Development

HTML to JavaScript — help with web dev modules, personal projects, and building your portfolio as a varsity student.

  • HTML5 structure & semantics
  • CSS3 — layouts, Flexbox, Grid, animations
  • JavaScript — DOM, events, fetch API
  • Responsive design for mobile
  • Frontend frameworks introduction
  • Hosting & deployment (Vercel, GitHub Pages)
💬 Get Web Dev Help

Web Services

Website Development

Need a professional website? Anotida builds clean, modern, and fully responsive websites tailored to your needs — whether you're a school, a small business, or building your personal brand online.

Every site is built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript — fast, lightweight, and deployable within days. No bloated builders, no monthly fees — just clean code that works.

What You Get
  • ✓ Fully responsive — works on mobile & desktop
  • ✓ Custom design matching your brand colours
  • ✓ Fast loading — clean, optimised code
  • ✓ Free deployment to a live URL
  • ✓ Contact forms & social media links
  • ✓ WhatsApp integration
🏫

Schools & Colleges

Professional school websites with info pages, staff directories, news sections, and contact forms. Make your institution look credible online.

👤

Personal Brands

Portfolio sites, CV websites, and personal brand pages. Stand out from the crowd with a professional online presence like this one.

🏪

Small Businesses

Business landing pages, service showcases, and product listings. Get found online and turn visitors into customers.

⛪

Churches & Organisations

Clean, welcoming websites for churches, NGOs, and community groups — event listings, sermons, donations, and more.

🌍
